methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $270M last post money.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Transportation (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 1 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 4 same-sector peers exist in Transportation, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

data.narrative:
REGENT Craft is a Series A transportation company founded by Billy Thalheimer and Mike Klinker, currently valued at $270M post-money with $60M raised to date. The Transportation sector comp universe includes eight private peers (Rivian, The Boring Company, Einride, Harbinger, FleetZero among them) and no public comparables, limiting traditional peer-median benchmarking.

The Stage-Progression method is the primary applicable approach, applying a 2.0x step-up multiplier from the $270M Series A post-money valuation to estimate next-stage value at $540M. This reflects typical Series A to Series B progression in venture-backed hardware and transportation ventures. Peer-Median analysis was not applicable due to insufficient narrowly-filtered comparables; while four same-sector peers exist, fewer than three met stage or valuation-tier alignment criteria, making a reliable median unachievable without introducing distortion.

The triangulated valuation range spans $459M (low) to $621M (high) around a $540M median, derived from the single applicable method. The material uncertainty stems from reliance on one methodology rather than convergence across independent approaches. Additional downside risk centers on Transportation's capital intensity and extended commercialization timelines. Upside hinges on execution against development milestones and competitive positioning within the limited peer set. Given the constrained comp universe, validation through revenue-progression scenarios or customer pipeline metrics would strengthen conviction in any specific point estimate within this range.
